Test Case Name: Login and Navigate to ESS Dashboard
Description: Verify user can login and access ESS dashboard
Steps: 1. Navigate to zimyo.net 2. Enter email (sachin.sharma+demo@zimyo.com) 3. Enter password 4. Click Login 5. Click nine-dot app switcher 6. Click ESS
Expected Result: User is redirected to /ess/dashboard/my-dashboard with all widgets visible

Description: Check Apply New button shows dropdown with leave/request options
Steps: 1. Login to ESS 2. Navigate to Dashboard 3. Click 'Apply New' button 4. Observe dropdown options
Expected Result: Dropdown shows options for Leave, Attendance, Requests etc.

Expected Result: Clock In button is visible and clickable
